TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Sow'hu Sra (Holam: ŚģąŤ≠∑Sra, ira ko Midipot to Sra) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca saka 12 a folad saka 26 a romi'ad 9:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Sra: Ciyang Cen-kai Mayaw: Liyang Ci-woy Nayaw: Cian Yi-tung
S.PHON: o~u so~uw °ńßo~u~u sra (ńßo~u…ĺam: **sra, ira ko~u mi…¨~…ģipo~ut to~u sra) ¶a ¶…ôj kamo~uko~u °aj a ti…ĺifi …ô*a i tajwan. misaŇča ° pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-min ¶i ina to~u ti…ĺifi …ô*a. mipasa…¨~…ģak to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ *:** …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja. mianiŇčaja a patiŇčso~u Ē sra: ¶ijaŇč ¶…ôn-kai majaw: …ĺijaŇč ¶i-wo~uj najaw: ¶ian ji-to~u~uŇč
S.FORM: O Sow'hu Sra (Holam: ŚģąŤ≠∑Sra, ira ko Midipot to Sra) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca saka 12 a folad saka 26 a romi'ad 9:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Sra: Ciyang Cen-kai Mayaw: Liyang Ci-woy Nayaw: Cian Yi-tung
